params.name: Draupnir
params.description: Draupnir, forged by the dwarf brothers Sindri and Brokkr as a token of gratitude for the wisdom bestowed by Odin. This ring possesses an extraordinary trait: every nine days, it replicates itself, producing eight identical gold rings from its center. This magical artifact was ultimately placed as a grave good on the funeral pyre of Odin's son, Baldr. Even in the afterlife, Draupnir's regenerative power continues to function, symbolizing the eternal cycle of life and wealth.
